name: Creamy Chocolate Fudge
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Evaporated milk or thin cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease an 8x8 inches square pan with butter.
2. Grease a heavy-bottomed saucepan with butter.
3. Grate the chocolate into the saucepan and add the sugar, milk (or cream), and corn syrup.
4. Stir over low heat until the chocolate melts and the sugar dissolves.
5. Increase the heat to medium-high and boil the mixture until it reaches the soft ball stage (240°F).
6. Stir just enough to prevent scorching, then remove from the heat and add the butter.
7. Cool to lukewarm (110°F) without stirring.
8. Add the vanilla.
9. Beat until the candy loses its gloss and becomes thick enough to hold its shape. This will take 10 minutes with an electric mixer or longer by hand.
10. Immediately spread into the prepared pan.
11. Cool and cut into squares. Yields 36 pieces.
